```mjs title=main.mjs
import * as _rspack_external_webpack_sources_lib_index_js_06790234 from "webpack-sources/lib/index.js";
import * as namespace_sourcesNs from "webpack-sources/lib/index.js";

import { createRequire as __rspack_createRequire } from "node:module";
const __rspack_createRequire_require = __rspack_createRequire(import.meta.url);
// ws-ns

// ./namespace.js




// ws-cjs
const index_js_namespaceObject = __rspack_createRequire_require("webpack-sources/lib/index.js");
// ./named.js


// ./index.js






it("should not emit duplicate identifiers when the same external target is rendered via module-import and node-commonjs", async () => {
  const mod = await import(/* webpackIgnore: true */ "./main.mjs");

  expect(mod.sourcesNs.RawSource).toBe(index_js_namespaceObject.RawSource);
  expect(mod.sourcesNs.SourceMapSource).toBe(index_js_namespaceObject.SourceMapSource);
  expect(mod.sourcesNs.RawSource).toBe(namespace_sourcesNs.RawSource);
  expect(mod.sourcesNs.SourceMapSource).toBe(namespace_sourcesNs.SourceMapSource);
});

var RawSource_0 = index_js_namespaceObject.RawSource;
var SourceMapSource_0 = index_js_namespaceObject.SourceMapSource;
export { RawSource_0 as RawSource, SourceMapSource_0 as SourceMapSource, namespace_sourcesNs as sourcesNs };

```
